'''Glynnis Talken Campbell''' (born [[June 12]], [[1950s#1957|1957]]) is an [[Wikipedia:Novelist|novelist]] and [[Wikipedia:Voice acting|voice artist]]. Glynnis voiced [[Salla Zend]], [[Vima-Da-Boda]], and [[Jem Ysanna]] in the [[Dark Empire: The Collector's Edition|''Dark Empire'' audio dramas]]<ref name="Dark Empire Collectors">[[Dark Empire: The Collector's Edition|''Dark Empire'' audio dramas]]</ref> and [[Nomi Sunrider]] in the [[Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith (audio)|''Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith'' audio drama]].<ref name="Dark Lords of the Sith">[[Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith (audio)|''Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith'' audio drama]]</ref> Glynnis is perhaps best known for voicing [[Wikipedia:Sarah Kerrigan|Sarah Kerrigan]] in the computer game [[Wikipedia:StarCraft|''StarCraft'']] and writing romance books.<ref name="Blizz Planet interview" />
